strategy: Participatory Risk Mapping and Action Triggers
critical_function: makes lived hazard exposure access barriers cultural sites and service failures visible and links them to action triggers
supports resident-led air water heat flood biodiversity and infrastructure monitoring with technical assistance
protects Indigenous knowledge sovereignty cultural protocols consent data governance and co-governance
compensates community expertise and embeds local knowledge in planning budgets monitoring and public accountability

strategy: Trusted Messenger and Local Warning System
critical_function: uses trusted local institutions to translate warnings early alerts public-health guidance and recovery information

strategy: Recovery Feedback and Administrative Burden Review
critical_function: uses lived recovery experience to identify administrative burden benefit barriers exclusion and recovery inequity
